summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Iteration 11 features: Strategy Optimizer (POST /api/replay/optimize), Social/Copy Trading (POST /api/social/share, GET /api/social/leaderboard, POST /api/social/follow/{id}, GET /api/social/following), and extracted Dashboard/Options components. All 20 backend tests passed (100%). Fixed critical bug in OptionsTab component (missing fetchAutoStrategy and isLoadingStrategy props). All frontend tabs verified working.

fixed_bugs.issue: ReferenceError: fetchAutoStrategy is not defined - missing props in ctx
fixed_bugs.fix: Added fetchAutoStrategy and isLoadingStrategy to ctx prop in App.js and destructured in OptionsTab.jsx

passed_tests: Strategy Optimizer: POST /api/replay/optimize with default params returns best, top_10, total_combinations, events_tested
Strategy Optimizer: POST /api/replay/optimize with custom ranges works
Strategy Optimizer: POST /api/replay/optimize with specific event_ids works
Social Share: POST /api/social/share creates strategy with id, name, config, performance, author, public, followers, score
Social Leaderboard: GET /api/social/leaderboard returns ranked strategies list
Social Follow: POST /api/social/follow/{id} follows strategy and returns config
Social Follow: POST /api/social/follow/{id} toggles to unfollow on second call
Social Follow: POST /api/social/follow/nonexistent returns 404
Social Following: GET /api/social/following returns strategies user is following
Social My Strategies: GET /api/social/my-strategies returns user's shared strategies
Regression: GET /api/system/status returns running status
Regression: POST /api/auth/login with admin credentials works
Regression: POST /api/replay/simulate still works
Regression: POST /api/replay/compare still works
Regression: GET /api/bot/status returns enabled, min_confidence
Regression: GET /api/fragility returns score, level
Regression: GET /api/options/chain/CL returns options
Regression: GET /api/alerts returns alerts list
Regression: GET /api/trades/export/csv returns CSV
Integration: Optimizer -> Share -> Leaderboard flow works
Integration: Follow strategy and receive config to apply works
Frontend: Dashboard tab renders with all 13 panels (DashboardTab component)
Frontend: Options tab renders with all 6 panels (OptionsTab component) - AFTER FIX
Frontend: Replay tab shows Strategy Optimizer with 'Find Best Config' button
Frontend: Replay tab optimizer shows best config, Apply to Bot, Share buttons, top 10 table
Frontend: Social tab shows Strategy Leaderboard with 5 strategies
Frontend: Social tab Follow buttons work and add to Following section
Frontend: Settings tab shows Price Alerts and Trade Export panels
seed_data_creation: Test strategies created during testing (TEST_Strategy_*, TEST_Optimized_*, TEST_FollowMe_*, TEST_ApplyConfig_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 features fully functional after bug fix. New features: 1) Strategy Optimizer (POST /api/replay/optimize) - grid search over 108 parameter combinations to find best risk-adjusted config. Returns best config, top_10 list, total_combinations, events_tested. Frontend shows 'Find Best Config' button, best config panel with 'Apply to Bot' and 'Share' buttons, and top 10 table. 2) Social/Copy Trading - POST /api/social/share creates public strategy, GET /api/social/leaderboard returns ranked strategies, POST /api/social/follow/{id} follows/unfollows and returns config to apply, GET /api/social/following returns followed strategies. Frontend Social tab shows leaderboard with Follow buttons and Following section. 3) Dashboard and Options extracted to separate components (DashboardTab.jsx, OptionsTab.jsx). Fixed bug where OptionsTab was missing fetchAutoStrategy and isLoadingStrategy props. All features from iterations 1-10 continue to work correctly.

mocked_apis.note: All trading is simulated via PaperBroker. Market data is simulated. Replay events use pre-defined trajectories. ML regime detection uses Emergent LLM Key.

response_structure.top_10: array of configs sorted by score

OptionsTab.bug_fixed: Added missing fetchAutoStrategy and isLoadingStrategy props

bug_fix_applied.issue: OptionsTab component threw ReferenceError: fetchAutoStrategy is not defined
bug_fix_applied.root_cause: When extracting OptionsTab to separate component, fetchAutoStrategy and isLoadingStrategy were not passed in ctx prop
fix_files: /app/frontend/src/App.js - Added fetchAutoStrategy, isLoadingStrategy to OptionsTab ctx prop
/app/frontend/src/components/tabs/OptionsTab.jsx - Added fetchAutoStrategy, isLoadingStrategy to destructured ctx
